name: Cabbage & Dumpling Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the firm tofu with water until smooth.
2. Sift the dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, black pepper, and salt).
3. Stir in the tofu mixture.
4. Knead for 1 minute, then form into 1/2-inch balls. Set aside.
5. Mince the core of the cabbage and shred the leaves finely.
6. Heat oil in a soup pot.
7. Add the shredded cabbage to the pot and sauté over medium heat until golden brown.
8. Add water and bay leaf. Return to a boil, then add the dumpling balls.
9. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes. The dumplings should be floating on the top at this point.
10. Remove the bay leaf.
11. Dilute the soy sauce in some of the broth, then add it to the soup.
12. Simmer for another 5 minutes.
13. Serve garnished with chopped scallions.
